programme.desc: Ronia, the robber’s daughter, is born on a stormy night when lightning strikes and divides the fort into two halves

programme.title: Ronia, Nighean a' Mheirlich/Ronja, the Robber's Daughter
programme.desc: When Ronia is 10 years old, the now lively young girl is given permission to go out into the forest for the first time

programme.title: Geamaichean Gorach
programme.desc: Coinneach Clogaid is up to his usual bad behaviour

programme.title: An Là (News)
programme.desc: Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA

programme.title: Ceolas | A' Cheilidh Mhor
programme.desc: Traditional tunes from some of Scotland's leading young musicians from Tulloch Castle

programme.title: An Gobha - The Last Blacksmith
programme.desc: A profile of Calum 'Steallag' MacLeod, who was one of the last remaining traditional blacksmiths in Scotland and a much respected and admired member of the Lewis & Harris community

programme.title: Celtic Connections
programme.desc: Ross Couper and Tom Oakes perform one of their sets rooted in Scottish and Irish traditions

programme.title: Oidhche Challainn le Robert Robertson
programme.desc: Robert Robertson takes a look at Hogmanay celebrations on TV through the years

programme.title: Ceol na Loidhne/Song of the Track
programme.desc: Ingrid Henderson celebrates a collection of more than 100 newly-discovered photographs of the West Highland Line, one of the most spectacular railway tracks in the world

programme.title: Cinema Gadelica
programme.desc: How film-makers have been drawn to the Highlands and Islands to shoot amid the spectacular scenery of the Gaidhealtachd. Discover James Bond’s Glencoe birthplace, as revealed in Skyfall. Join Harry Potter on his way to Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry via the Glenfinnan Viaduct, and set out on Ridley Scott’s Prometheus to discover the origins of humankind – starting the mission at the Quiraing in Skye

programme.title: Siud agad e! 2020
programme.desc: Kathleen MacInnes and Calum MacKinnon present a series of sketches from a mock newsroom interspersed with a tongue-in-cheek commentary on the year just passed

programme.title: Ceilidh na Bliadhn' Uire 2020
programme.desc: Cathy Macdonald and Niall Iain Macdonald welcome you as they raise a glass at the bells to bid farewell to the old year and welcome in the New Year. Performing on the show will be Peat & Diesel, Glenfinnan Ceilidh Band, the trio Sian and ceilidh band Trail West.

programme.title: Alba Today
programme.desc: BBC Alba joins Radio nan Gàidheal, the BBC's Gaelic language radio service

programme.title: Good Morning Britain
programme.desc: Craig Charles chats about his New Year show on 6 Music, putting his live DJ sets on hold due to Covid-19, and battling seasickness on the choppy waves in Don't Rock The Boat

programme.title: Lorraine
programme.desc: Entertainment, current affairs and fashion news, as well as showbiz stories and celebrity gossip. Presented by Lorraine Kelly

programme.title: Celebrity Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a star-studded edition of the game show, with teams consisting of Emmerdale stars Charley Webb and Matthew Wolfenden, The Chase's Jenny Ryan and singer Megan McKenna, and DJs Melvin Odoom and Rickie Haywood-Williams racing down the aisles to win a £10,000 jackpot for the charity of their choice

programme.title: Happy Feet (2006)
programme.desc: A young penguin disappoints his fellow seabirds with his inability to sing - but instead he displays a remarkable talent for tap dancing. However, his elders refuse to accept this outlandish behaviour and send the youngster into exile, marking the start of a wonderful journey. Animated adventure, with the voices of Elijah Wood, Robin Williams, Nicole Kidman and Hugh Jackman

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The launch of the latest sparkling wine by Midsomer Vinae Winery falls flat when critic Nadia Simons gives it a scathing review, then guests sampling the vintage start to collapse. Owner William Carnarvon suspects the Farmers' Wives Association of trying to destroy his business, while his wife Diana frets over her mother Matilda, one of the victims. Pathologist Kate reveals the drink was laced with slug poison, but how is the attack connected to the death of a child in a hit-and-run? Barnaby and Nelson are called in to investigate. Neil Dudgeon and Gwilym Lee star in the mystery drama, with Claire Bloom, Mark Bonnar, Rosie Cavaliero and Ruth Gemmell

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis in which a team of five workmates answers questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then tries to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. Josh, Steven, Amelia and Lynne work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Marlon feels lonely, Mack has a proposition, and it remains to be seen whether Al's secret will be exposed

programme.title: Wonder Woman (2017)
programme.desc: An Amazon princess has her first encounter with the outside world during the First World War, when an American airman crash lands on her isolated island home. Determined to bring the chaos sweeping the world to an end, she ventures onto the front line in the war to end all wars to bring down an ancient and powerful evil force that is driving the human race towards destruction. Superhero fantasy adventure, starring Gal Gadot, Chris Pine and David Thewlis

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: It's Clarkson on TV
programme.desc: The acerbic host passes judgement on what the great British public watched in 2020 - and didn't - and highlights some fascinating foreign TV shows that managed to make it to air. Shows under his gaze include gripping dramas White House Farm, Quiz and Des, as well as the latest offerings from the streaming services including dating shows such as Love Is Blind and property shows like Selling Sunset

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Good Morning Britain anchor Piers Morgan and Diversity's Jordan Banjo take up the challenge, hoping to win as much as £1miilion for their chosen charities. As ever, lifelines including Phone a Friend, Ask the Host and 50-50 are available to them if they get stuck. Presented by Jeremy Clarkson

programme.title: Jennifer Saunders' Memory Lane
programme.desc: Jennifer slips behind the wheel of a classic red Jaguar E-Type, joined in the passenger seat by Hollywood actor Michael Sheen whom she quizzes about his life and times. Heading to Port Talbot where Michael grew up, they stop at key locations to prompt personal stories from his childhood right up to the present day. Drawing on evocative family photos and colourful local archive, Michael's recollections are by turns funny, surprising and incredibly poignant

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: When 39-year-old Durham dad Philip Hunter discovered he had terminal cancer, he got in touch with Alan Titchmarsh and his team to build a special garden for him, his wife Sam and two boys, Ethan and Josh to enjoy in his final years. However, when tragedy strikes earlier than expected, Alan and his colleagues do their best to create the garden Philip would have wanted. By using some clever design, the team fills the modestly sized plot with elegant features and details, but will the family like the result?

programme.title: ITV Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. programme.title: Good Morning Britain
programme.desc: Morning magazine featuring a lively mix of news and current affairs, plus health, entertainment and lifestyle features

programme.title: Lorraine
programme.desc: Entertainment, current affairs and fashion news, as well as showbiz stories and celebrity gossip. Presented by Lorraine Kelly

programme.title: Celebrity Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Trolley-dashing in Rylan Clark-Neal's supermarket for the chance to win £10,000 for charity are Loose Women's Andrea McLean and Nadia Sawalha, football legends Harry Redknapp and Paul Merson, and actor friends Rita Simons and Chizzy Akudolu

programme.title: News at 5 and a Half
programme.desc: A review of the year's biggest news stories from a surprising perspective. Children aged between five and 10 have hijacked over the newsroom and are giving their take on everything from Donald Trump's hairstyle to TikTok dance crazes. They also enjoy some of the great viral clips from 2020, including jumping loo roll dog and Lockdown Tina Turner

programme.title: Happy Feet Two (2011)
programme.desc: A tap-dancing penguin goes searching for his missing son, but his search leads him to discover a drifting iceberg that threatens to destroy his colony. He sets out to unite all the birds in the Antarctic to avert the catastrophe. Animated musical comedy sequel, with the voices of Elijah Wood, Robin Williams, Ava Acres and Hank Azaria

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: At a Christmas family get-together, a cracker riddle states two people will die before midnight on Boxing Day, and just a few hours later family matriarch Lydia meets an untimely end - giving Barnaby the perfect reason to escape a boring Christmas with his in-laws. John Nettles and John Hopkins star, with guest appearances by Haydn Gwynne and Margery Mason

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis in which a family of five answers questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then tries to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. programme.title: The Chase

They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Andrea gives Jamie an ultimatum, Harriet struggles to move on, and Mack spots an opportunity

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Todd goads Paul into breaking the law, Ken is devastated by Peter's despondent attitude, and Imran admits turning down a new foster child

programme.title: Stephen Fry's 21st Century Firsts
programme.desc: Stephen Fry explores the biggest social and technological changes of the past 20 years, with the aid of archive footage and contributions from experts and famous faces. He reflects on how social media has transformed the way people interact, while sites like Airbnb and Tinder have drastically changed dating and holidays. Stephen also reflects on sweeping social changes like same sex marriage and the smoking ban, looks back on Stormzy's groundbreaking headline show at Glastonbury 2019, and examines how the likes of Greta Thunberg and Captain Sir Tom Moore have transformed grass roots politics

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: Rock On, Tommy: The Bobby Ball Story
programme.desc: In an extended tribute to one of the UK's most popular entertainers, friends, family and co-stars celebrate the life and work of comedian and actor Bobby Ball. It reveals how a factory welder from Oldham went on to become one of the best loved stars on British television. It's narrated by Bobby's colleague of 57 years, Tommy Cannon

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Christmas is just around the corner in Chigwell, and there are big changes in the women's lives. Dorien is now ruling the roost, having bought the house, and she and Tracey have been getting on each other's nerves. To make matters worse, Sharon won't be home as she's stuck on a cruise ship in Costa Rica, so Tracey's young friend Amy has moved in, and is looking forward to a miserable lockdown Christmas. Dorien then brings home her new gentleman friend Graeme. Does he know what he's getting himself into? Return of the comedy, starring Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph, with Les Dennis and Ami Metcalf

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Host Jeremy Clarkson turns up the pressure for Prue Leith, Kym Marsh and Ronni Ancona as they try to answer 15 questions with the help of four lifelines to win a million pounds for their chosen charities

programme.title: Living on the Veg
programme.desc: Henry Firth and Ian Theasby serve up a plant-based lasagne, a vegan breakfast - including smoky barbecue beans, vegan scrambled eggs and a meat-free alternative to bacon - and salted caramel apple crumble with custard. The duo also try to convince meat-loving weatherman Alex Beresford that their big bosh burger is as good as the meaty ones he loves, and for their snack hacks, they show off their recipes for nut butters

programme.title: ITV Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Good Morning Britain
programme.desc: Morning magazine featuring a lively mix of news and current affairs, plus health, entertainment and lifestyle features

programme.title: Lorraine
programme.desc: Entertainment, current affairs and fashion news, as well as showbiz stories and celebrity gossip

programme.title: Celebrity Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Manager Rylan Clark-Neal invites Diversity's Jordan Banjo and Perri Kiely, pop icon Martin Kemp and DJ son Roman, and Gavin and Stacey stars Joanna Page and Melanie Walters into his supermarket for the chance to win £10,000 for their chosen charities

programme.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory (2005)
programme.desc: Penniless Charlie Bucket is one of five lucky children who find a golden ticket in a chocolate bar, winning a once-in-a-lifetime tour of eccentric recluse Willy Wonka's magical sweet company. Unfortunately, the other winners each face a grim fate when they start to misbehave. Tim Burton's children's fantasy, based on Roald Dahl's novel, starring Johnny Depp, Freddie Highmore, Helena Bonham Carter, and Deep Roy playing all the Oompa Loompas

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When wealthy landowner Gregory Lancaster's body goes missing on the night of his death, a sinister web of secrets and lies is exposed in the village of Little Malton. As DCI Barnaby, DS Nelson and new forensic pathologist Kam Karimore investigate the mysterious crime, they find themselves drawn into a macabre world of body-snatching during their quest to identify the perpetrator. Detective drama, starring Neil Dudgeon, Gwilym Lee, Manjinder Virk, Helen Baxendale and Navin Chowdhry

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Five members of the East Yorkshire rounders team the Beverley Bombers answer questions about top 10 lists, then try to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money. Game show, hosted by Warwick Davis

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill presents clips of seasonal slip-ups and festive fiascos, including a postman being attacked by a turkey, a toddler asking Santa for a beer and a runaway car wrecking a grotto

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Marlon has plans, Mandy prepares for a boozy New Year's, and a vicar arrives in the village

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Adam and Sarah end the year with a fresh start, Ray and Debbie offer Nick new premises for Underworld, and Tim recaptures his past for Elaine

programme.title: Skyfall (2012)
programme.desc: James Bond pursues a mysterious criminal mastermind who has orchestrated a terrorist attack on MI6 headquarters and exposed the identities of undercover agents around the world. The trail leads to a rogue former operative who has a personal vendetta against the intelligence organisation's leader M - who is also facing calls to retire. Sam Mendes directs the 23rd instalment in the spy franchise, starring Daniel Craig as 007, with Javier Bardem, Judi Dench, Ralph Fiennes, Naomie Harris and Ben Whishaw

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Russell Kane, Leonie Elliott, Kevin Clifton and Bonnie Langford pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds for charity. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts the game show, asking three contestants to 'see it and say it' as they try to guess the familiar phrases hidden in animated clues. After the first elimination, the two remaining players battle to reach the Super Catchphrase round, where one of them could win £50,000

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Five dentistry students answer questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then try to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money. Hosted by Warwick Davis

The duo also try to convince meat-loving weatherman Alex Beresford that their big bosh burger is as good as the meaty ones he loves, and for their snack hacks, they show off their recipes for nut butters

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

Unfortunately, the other winners each face a grim fate when they start to misbehave. Tim Burton's children's fantasy, based on Roald Dahl's novel, starring Johnny Depp, Freddie Highmore, Helena Bonham Carter, and Deep Roy playing all the Oompa Loompas

Detective drama, starring Neil Dudgeon, Gwilym Lee, Manjinder Virk, Helen Baxendale and Navin Chowdhry

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Lisa worries when Zak doesn't come home all night. Jack and Sarah plan a family meal for their anniversary. Vic has a surprise in store for Viv

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Joe prepares to take up his new post in London, but secretly regrets the decision to leave the Yorkshire Moors. However, the arrival of his replacement PC Wetherby signals it is too late to change his mind. Nurse Carol is administering vaccinations at the school when she notices extensive bruising on a boy's body and suspects he is being abused. The youngster lives with his mother and stepfather, but recently his biological father has been back in touch, trying to see the boy - something the courts will not allow. However, tragedy strikes when conflict grows between the angry father and stepfather - with one of the Aidensfield bobbies caught in the crossfire. Rupert Ward-Lewis joins the cast

programme.title: Carry On Doctor (1967)
programme.desc: A popular doctor is sacked after a misunderstanding ruins his reputation, prompting the furious patients to stage a revolt against the luckless medic's strait-laced superiors. Meanwhile, the hospital head has his own problems after becoming the unlikely romantic target of a strict matron. Comedy, with Frankie Howerd, Jim Dale, Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey and Hattie Jacques

programme.title: Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory (1971)
programme.desc: An eccentric confectionery king announces that five children will be given a tour of his wondrous factory. The winners turn out to be a kind-hearted boy from a penniless family and four obnoxious brats, who face a terrible fate when they misbehave. Musical fantasy, based on Roald Dahl's classic book Charlie and the Chocolate Factory, starring Gene Wilder, Jack Albertson, Peter Ostrum and Roy Kinnear

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Gina struggles to cope with Phil's death and refuses Carol's offer to prescribe her sleeping pills, determined to deal with things on her own. However, with the funeral scheduled for the next day, an emotional service that sees the whole of Aidensfield turning out to say their farewells to the much-loved bobby, it seems the grieving landlady is expecting too much of herself. Over at the station, Don is racked with guilt over the shooting of his colleague, convinced he should have taken the bullet. Despite George's reassurances, the bobby believes the villagers will blame him for the death of a close friend and decides to pack his bags - until the sergeant makes him a proposition. Meanwhile, the officers investigate the suspected suicide of a local teacher and Carol fails to report an elderly motorist involved in a hit-and-run with a cyclist, which proves particularly embarrassing when the victim turns out to be the hospital's new doctor. Leon Ockenden joins the cast

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Biff starts his job as Tara's chauffeur. Chris enjoys all the gossip about Steve and Kim's problems. Becky agrees that Emma can stay with the Sugdens

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Steve is furious with Kim for selling her shares in Home Farm. Vic and Viv arrange to spend more time together. Alan worries about trade at the Woolpack

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mike gets an order for 25,000 knickers. Judy breaks down when she is told she si not able to have children. Jack is annoyed when Alec makes an offer for the pub

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Angie is surprised when Chris offers to move out. Sally tells Kevin she knows he is keeping something from her. Fiona tells Steve he is wasting his time pursuing her

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A visiting American academic delivers a controversial speech, with many audience members worried his ideas could be used to target ethnic minorities. So when he is found hanged the next morning and Dr Hobson quickly discounts suicide, Lewis and Hathaway realise they have many suspects - from the local anti-racism activist who was first in voicing her disgust at the professor's beliefs to the women who had bombarded him with threatening e-mails. But then another body turns up and the case takes on a new dimension. David Soul and Patrick Baladi guest star

programme.title: Tommy Cooper Forever
programme.desc: First in a two-part tribute to the comedy magician, revealing how an act that started out in the desert during the Second World War went on to take the entertainment world by storm. Narrated by Martin Clunes and featuirng contributions from famous fans including Jennifer Saunders, Simon Callow, Lionel Blair, Anita Harris, Les Dennis and Jerome Flynn

programme.title: Tommy Cooper Forever
programme.desc: Part two of two. Singer and actress Anita Harris retraces her footsteps back to the London Palladium where she worked with Tommy. Comedian Les Dennis makes an emotional trip back to Her Majesty's Theatre to remember the night he saw Tommy's final performance. Plus, how Cooper became an unlikely comedy hero on Dutch TV in the 1960s

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: As England and Argentina kick off in the World Cup quarter-final, Oxford's streets are deserted. At an almost empty museum, Adrian Weiss, a specialist in heraldry and genealogy, is found dead - slain by a ceremonial dagger with links to 19th-century India. An entry in the visitors' book leads Morse to a girls' boarding school, where a note reading 'Save Me' is mysteriously slipped into his coat pocket. Digging into the building's troubled history, he finds a connection between Weiss's untimely fate and a series of unsolved murders that occurred on the school's grounds almost 100 years earlier. 1960s-set drama, starring Shaun Evans, with Roger Allam, Anton Lesser, James Bradshaw and Abigail Thaw

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Barnaby is dragged along to the wedding of the son of Sarah's friend Hazel, the last thing he expects to find himself doing is investigating a murder. But when his wife discovers the body of the bride, Laurel, who has been squeezed to death by her own wedding dress corset, the detective must look more closely at his fellow guests. The victim's husband Gavin is convinced that his wife's death had everything to do with her outspoken nature on her radio show, so Winter's attention soon turns to her unique community of nocturnal listeners. Gavin's scorned ex-fiancee and local wedding dress designer Serena also comes under suspicion, and Barnaby and Winter's enquiries lead them to a local wedding fayre. Neil Dudgeon stars, with Kelly Brook, Nick Hancock and Liz Fraser

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama starring Brenda Blethyn. The detective investigates a fire that rips through a holiday park on the Northumberland coast, destroying three cabins. A young woman's body is discovered and the resort's owner, Jim Viner, fears the victim is his sister Deena when he returns from a weekend away with his daughter Clare. With Jim's suspicions confirmed, a police report then reveals Clare's boyfriend Ryan and his friends had been partying near the scene hours before the blaze started, but where are they now, and where is Deena's best friend Sally? Co-starring Kenny Doughty, Cush Jumbo and Jon Morrison

programme.title: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: Ross Kemp plays loan shark Eddie Scrooge, whose legendary cruelty strikes fear into the hearts of the poor borrowers who live on his crumbling estate. Anticipating a profitable Christmas Day - when his clients will all be at home - he is shocked, and none too pleased, by the appearance the night before of his deceased business partner Jacob Marley. Worse still, the grim ghost is on a mission to show Eddie the error of his ways in a terrifying journey through the past, present and future. Also starring Warren Mitchell, Ray Fearon and Liz Smith

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective is ordered to take a holiday for the benefit of his health, and with Hastings and Miss Lemon in tow, reluctantly heads for the tranquillity of Devon's coast, where his relaxation is soon ruined by the discovery of a socialite's murdered body on the beach. Several people had reason for wishing Arlena Stuart dead, but high on the list of suspects are her husband, teenage son and a troubled vicar. David Suchet, Hugh Fraser, Philip Jackson and Pauline Moran star

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Rog gets busy organising the team's first match, while Mim tries to cheer up Bob after Ginnie gives him his marching orders. Maggie's sister inadvertently lets slip a secret - with devastating consequences. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mike gets an order for 25,000 knickers. Judy breaks down when she is told she si not able to have children. Jack is annoyed when Alec makes an offer for the pub

programme.desc: Angie is surprised when Chris offers to move out. Sally tells Kevin she knows he is keeping something from her. Fiona tells Steve he is wasting his time pursuing her

programme.desc: Biff starts his job as Tara's chauffeur. Chris enjoys all the gossip about Steve and Kim's problems. Becky agrees that Emma can stay with the Sugdens

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Steve is furious with Kim for selling her shares in Home Farm. Vic and Viv arrange to spend more time together. Alan worries about trade at the Woolpack

Meanwhile, the officers investigate the suspected suicide of a local teacher and Carol fails to report an elderly motorist involved in a hit-and-run with a cyclist, which proves particularly embarrassing when the victim turns out to be the hospital's new doctor. Leon Ockenden joins the cast

programme.title: Carry On Girls (1973)
programme.desc: The council of a seaside town is in dire need of a means to attract tourists to its resort, so announces a beauty contest. While the conniving organiser plots a series of publicity stunts, an outraged feminist group plans to sabotage the event. Comedy, starring Sid James, June Whitfield, Joan Sims, Barbara Windsor, Bernard Bresslaw and Peter Butterworth

programme.title: Goodnight Mister Tom (1998)
programme.desc: John Thaw stars in this adaptation of Michelle Magorian's wartime novel as Tom Oakley, an irascible widower whose life is changed for ever when nine-year-old London evacuee Willie is billeted in his cottage. The youngster takes to village life and the pair develop a strong bond - which looks set to be broken when Willie's tyrannical mother summons him back to the capital. Co-starring Nick Robinson and Annabelle Apsion

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Lesley Ashton (former Emmerdale actor Emma Atkins) arrives in Aidensfield looking for Don, and it is quickly clear that he is less than happy to see her, but despite his cool welcome she seems determined to make a new life for herself in the village. Elsewhere, Gina is pleased to be offered accommodation at the pub, Bernie receives a surprising offer from the recently widowed Iris Grocott and Ralph Spurling seeks Oscar's services as a private investigator after his house is broken into. Dominic Jephcott and Ann Mitchell guest star

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Marlon and Will tease Biff about his new job. Steve and Kim are faced with a raft of investors demanding their money back. Viv tackles Kelly about her attitude

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Vic apologises to Kelly for hitting her. Zoe and Kim have an argument on the anniversary of Frank's death. Biff is taken aback when Tara gives him a peck on the cheek

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Angie celebrates her 30th birthday. Alec enjoys being back behind the bar of the Rovers. Bill is upset to discover Maureen is seeing Fred

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Des is unaware that Derek has died and plays an awkward prank. Vera returns from Morecambe to discover Jack has sold half the pub to Alec

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: David Suchet takes on his final case as the Belgian sleuth in the last-ever episode of the long-running drama. Crippled with arthritis, Poirot is now using a wheelchair and has a life-threatening heart condition, but remains as sharp as ever. Calling on old friend Captain Hastings for assistance, he returns to Styles, where the pair first met 30 years earlier on a murder investigation. The detective is convinced the country house is once again harbouring a killer, and as guests fall victim to a mysterious attacker, he must summon the last of his strength to battle his ultimate nemesis. With Hugh Fraser, Anne Reid, Philip Glenister, Helen Baxendale, Matthew McNulty, Anna Madeley and Shaun Dingwall

programme.title: Larry Grayson: Shut That Door!
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the entertainer's rise from poverty to fame, drawing on extracts from an unfinished autobiography. Featuring contributions from friends and colleagues including Michael Barrymore, Janet Street-Porter, Chris Tarrant and Generation Game co-host Isla St Clair

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: A housewife found choked to death in her own home marks the third strangulation in a month, setting Oxford police on edge. As a manhunt begins in search of a murderer targeting married women, Endeavour looks into the origin of the silk stocking used to kill the latest victim, tracing the garment to its sole supplier in the city. However, as the suspect list narrows and the culprit stalks his prey with increasing desperation, Morse and Thursday find their private lives turned upside down and miss a deeper tragedy unfolding

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Things take a gruesome turn when Ferabbees Circus comes to town, bringing with it a chain of sinister clown sightings, threatening notes and deathly dangerous circus acts. Barnaby has to face up to his fears in order to solve the case. Drama, starring Neil Dudgeon, Nick Hendrix, Lorraine Ashbourne and Annette Badland

programme.title: Tommy Cooper Forever
programme.desc: First in a two-part tribute to the comedy magician, revealing how an act that started out in the desert during the Second World War went on to take the entertainment world by storm. Narrated by Martin Clunes and featuirng contributions from famous fans including Jennifer Saunders, Simon Callow, Lionel Blair, Anita Harris, Les Dennis and Jerome Flynn

programme.title: Tommy Cooper Forever
programme.desc: Part two of two. Singer and actress Anita Harris retraces her footsteps back to the London Palladium where she worked with Tommy. Comedian Les Dennis makes an emotional trip back to Her Majesty's Theatre to remember the night he saw Tommy's final performance. Plus, how Cooper became an unlikely comedy hero on Dutch TV in the 1960s

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: When the remains of a teenager are found half-buried in a wood, Vera finds herself investigating a 30-year-old mystery. Identified as Carrie Telling, a girl who disappeared during the 1984 miners' strike, the team retrieves news footage from the protests that shows her taking pictures in the background. It appears she got caught up in the unrest that day, contradicting her father's assertion that she went straight home. Photographs recovered from her camera yield further revelations for Vera. What did Carrie discover that ultimately led to her death?

programme.title: Rising Damp (1980)
programme.desc: Seedy landlord Rigsby takes in a seemingly respectable new lodger who jeopardises his efforts to romance tenant Miss Jones - but the new arrival may not be all he appears. Meanwhile, the addition of a rugby playing art student to the house sparks a fitness craze that leads Rigsby to enter a boxing match. Comedy based on the 1970s sitcom, starring Leonard Rossiter, Frances de la Tour and Don Warrington

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Kevin and Maggie have an awkward conversation about their fertility problems, while Rog and Mim arrive to discuss the forthcoming marriage blessing. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Josie Lawrence

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Angie celebrates her 30th birthday. Alec enjoys being back behind the bar of the Rovers. Bill is upset to discover Maureen is seeing Fred

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Des is unaware that Derek has died and plays an awkward prank. Vera returns from Morecambe to discover Jack has sold half the pub to Alec

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Marlon and Will tease Biff about his new job. Steve and Kim are faced with a raft of investors demanding their money back. Viv tackles Kelly about her attitude

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Vic apologises to Kelly for hitting her. Zoe and Kim have an argument on the anniversary of Frank's death. Biff is taken aback when Tara gives him a peck on the cheek

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Lesley Ashton (former Emmerdale actor Emma Atkins) arrives in Aidensfield looking for Don, and it is quickly clear that he is less than happy to see her, but despite his cool welcome she seems determined to make a new life for herself in the village. Elsewhere, Gina is pleased to be offered accommodation at the pub, Bernie receives a surprising offer from the recently widowed Iris Grocott and Ralph Spurling seeks Oscar's services as a private investigator after his house is broken into. Dominic Jephcott and Ann Mitchell guest star

programme.title: Carry On Behind (1975)
programme.desc: Professors Ronald Crump and Anna Vooshka embark on an archaeological dig, but find their efforts disrupted by the saucy shenanigans of a motley bunch of holiday-makers in the neighbouring caravan park. Comedy, starring Kenneth Williams, Elke Sommer, Joan Sims, Windsor Davies, Kenneth Connor and Bernard Bresslaw

programme.title: Goodbye Mr Chips
programme.desc: Martin Clunes stars as an earnest Latin master working at the Brookfield School of the 1880s, where he meets and marries his true love Kathie and finds himself touched by politics, grief and the utter devastation of World War One. Charting more than 50 years of one man's extraordinary life, the story ends in the 1930s, as a wise, elderly and much-loved Mr Chipping lives out his last days in retirement. Frank Delaney's adaptation of James Hilton's timeless classic, which has never been out of print since first appearing as a magazine serialisation in 1934, and for which Robert Donat whipped an Oscar from under the nose of Gone with the Wind's Clark Gable in the 1939 film production. Also starring Victoria Hamilton, Conleth Hill and Patrick Malahide

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Satanic symbols painted on the church door convince the Reverend John Peggotty there is an evil presence in the churchyard, but George is certain it is the work of hooligans. However, an attack on Lord Ashfordly's godson Chas uncovers information that suggests a more personal motive, leading the investigation into the world of drugs and rock music. Elsewhere, Gina frets over some personal news. Guest starring Jeff Rawle, Adam Croasdell and Adam Kotz

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Vic blames Kelly for Viv going away. Kim tries to come to terms with her last day of being the owner of Home Farm. Tara double-crosses Chris

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Chris is furious with Tara, but she refuses to speak to him. Tara has a further shock in store for Chris. Kelly bunks off college to help Mandy with the jumble sale

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve tells Fiona that Alan threatened him. Vera changes the locks on the pub and refuses to let Alec in. Judy is disturbed to see Zoe begging in the streets

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jack is annoyed when Alec starts to boss him around. Des is put out when Samantha shuns his advances. Alan finds out all about Steve's marriage to Vicky from Alec

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: Jeffrey and George get into the festive spirit by challenging each other to a game of computer tennis. Festive instalment of the comedy, from 1978, starring Brian Murphy and Norman Eshley

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: Mildred tries to make an impression at the Young Conservatives' ball, whereas George is determined to find his own Christmas spirit at the Red Lion

programme.title: The Best of Cannon and Ball
programme.desc: Double act Tommy Cannon and Bobby Ball entertain us with their own unique brand of humour. Featuring guest stars Status Quo and Rik Mayall

programme.title: The Royal Variety Performance
programme.desc: The annual extravaganza to raise money for the Royal Variety Charity features performances from Sheridan Smith, reprising her role as Cilla Black, and Samantha Barks in an exclusive preview of the forthcoming Frozen stage musical. The show also features music from Michael Ball, Gary Barlow, Steps, Melanie C and Britain's Got Talent winner Jon Courtenay. Other acts on the bill include Marisha Wallace, Celeste, Daliso Chaponda, Jo Caulfield, Stephen Mulhern and the Black Blues Brothers, plus an appearance by Captain Sir Thomas Moore

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: As plans to build a new police station lead Morse to question his place in the force, he investigates the case of Tommy Cork, a boy from a broken home who has disappeared. Meanwhile, the body of disreputable journalist Eric Patterson has been found on railway tracks in mysterious circumstances. He was last seen embroiled in an argument with a council official about a company preparing to redevelop the site of Blenheim Vale, a disused correctional facility for boys. When a petty criminal with a connection to Blenheim absconds from an open prison, it sets off a chain reaction of events that threaten to expose horrors of the past. Did missing Tommy witness something that cost him his life?

programme.title: The Comedy Years
programme.desc: A look back at TV comedy from 1979. It was a pivotal year for Britain, with a new prime minister in Margaret Thatcher and mass strikes leading to the so-called 'Winter of Discontent'. Television saw a return to political satire, with the BBC series Not the Nine O'Clock News, though the northern club scene was dominating comedic output at the time with the likes of The Cannon & Ball Show and the stand-up series The Comedians. Narrated by Hugh Bonneville

programme.title: Elton John: The Nation's Favourite Song
programme.desc: A countdown of the singer's 20 most popular songs, chosen by viewers to celebrate his 70th birthday. Elton discusses the stories behind the tracks in a candid conversation with David Walliams, while celebrity fans and friends reveal what their favourite numbers mean to them. With contributions from Ed Sheeran, Annie Lennox, Stephen Fry and Elton's longtime songwriting partner Bernie Taupin

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: When a body is dredged up from a slurry pit on a remote farm, the investigation forces owner Danny Pryor to admit he has a number of illegal Serbian workers on the payroll. A faded tattoo identifies the victim as Jack Reeves, a young man from the local travelling community, but what is his connection to the immigrants? As the case unfolds, Vera and her team must connect the dots between Jack and a wounded Serbian, and expose the tragic truth at the heart of Pryor Farm. With Mark Bonnar, Mark Womack and Jim Sturgeon

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: When dock worker Owen Thorne plunges from the roof of a multi-storey car park while picking up his daughter from her school prom, Vera immediately detects foul play. The team soon discovers a work dispute over the death of a young man, with everyone believing Owen was to blame, and the victim's father admits he wanted revenge - but his alibi holds. The mystery then continues when Vera spots an inconsistency in the statement Owen's wife gave to the police, suggesting she's not certain of her husband's fidelity

programme.title: Goodbye Mr Chips
programme.desc: Martin Clunes stars as an earnest Latin master working at the Brookfield School of the 1880s, where he meets and marries his true love Kathie and finds himself touched by politics, grief and the utter devastation of World War One. Charting more than 50 years of one man's extraordinary life, the story ends in the 1930s, as a wise, elderly and much-loved Mr Chipping lives out his last days in retirement. Frank Delaney's adaptation of James Hilton's timeless classic, which has never been out of print since first appearing as a magazine serialisation in 1934, and for which Robert Donat whipped an Oscar from under the nose of Gone with the Wind's Clark Gable in the 1939 film production. Also starring Victoria Hamilton, Conleth Hill and Patrick Malahide

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Japp and Poirot investigate the murder of an actress's estranged husband, only to find in the theatrical world, where deception and play-acting are a way of life, nothing is quite what it seems. In time-honoured fashion, it initially looks as though the butler did it - but subsequent inquiries throw up a veritable rogues' gallery of equally likely suspects. Philip Jackson, David Suchet and Hugh Fraser star

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sally wonders why Kevin is moody all the time. Alec warns Rita against going into partnership with Jack. Judy tells Gary about the laparoscopy and her abortion

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Gary is angry that Judy kept her abortion a secret. Steve is convinced he will win Fiona back. Kevin breaks down in front of Natalie, telling her he cannot cope

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama starring Brenda Blethyn. The detective investigates a fire that rips through a holiday park on the Northumberland coast, destroying three cabins. A young woman's body is discovered and the resort's owner, Jim Viner, fears the victim is his sister Deena when he returns from a weekend away with his daughter Clare. With Jim's suspicions confirmed, a police report then reveals Clare's boyfriend Ryan and his friends had been partying near the scene hours before the blaze started, but where are they now, and where is Deena's best friend Sally? Co-starring Kenny Doughty, Cush Jumbo and Jon Morrison

programme.title: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: Ross Kemp plays loan shark Eddie Scrooge, whose legendary cruelty strikes fear into the hearts of the poor borrowers who live on his crumbling estate. Anticipating a profitable Christmas Day - when his clients will all be at home - he is shocked, and none too pleased, by the appearance the night before of his deceased business partner Jacob Marley. Worse still, the grim ghost is on a mission to show Eddie the error of his ways in a terrifying journey through the past, present and future. Also starring Warren Mitchell, Ray Fearon and Liz Smith

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective is ordered to take a holiday for the benefit of his health, and with Hastings and Miss Lemon in tow, reluctantly heads for the tranquillity of Devon's coast, where his relaxation is soon ruined by the discovery of a socialite's murdered body on the beach. Several people had reason for wishing Arlena Stuart dead, but high on the list of suspects are her husband, teenage son and a troubled vicar. David Suchet, Hugh Fraser, Philip Jackson and Pauline Moran star

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective is ordered to take a holiday for the benefit of his health, and with Hastings and Miss Lemon in tow, reluctantly heads for the tranquillity of Devon's coast, where his relaxation is soon ruined by the discovery of a socialite's murdered body on the beach. Several people had reason for wishing Arlena Stuart dead, but high on the list of suspects are her husband, teenage son and a troubled vicar. David Suchet, Hugh Fraser, Philip Jackson and Pauline Moran star

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Rog gets busy organising the team's first match, while Mim tries to cheer up Bob after Ginnie gives him his marching orders. Maggie's sister inadvertently lets slip a secret - with devastating consequences. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mike gets an order for 25,000 knickers. Judy breaks down when she is told she si not able to have children. Jack is annoyed when Alec makes an offer for the pub

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Angie is surprised when Chris offers to move out. Sally tells Kevin she knows he is keeping something from her. Fiona tells Steve he is wasting his time pursuing her

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Biff starts his job as Tara's chauffeur. Chris enjoys all the gossip about Steve and Kim's problems. Becky agrees that Emma can stay with the Sugdens

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Steve is furious with Kim for selling her shares in Home Farm. Vic and Viv arrange to spend more time together. Alan worries about trade at the Woolpack

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Gina struggles to cope with Phil's death and refuses Carol's offer to prescribe her sleeping pills, determined to deal with things on her own. However, with the funeral scheduled for the next day, an emotional service that sees the whole of Aidensfield turning out to say their farewells to the much-loved bobby, it seems the grieving landlady is expecting too much of herself. Over at the station, Don is racked with guilt over the shooting of his colleague, convinced he should have taken the bullet. Despite George's reassurances, the bobby believes the villagers will blame him for the death of a close friend and decides to pack his bags - until the sergeant makes him a proposition. Meanwhile, the officers investigate the suspected suicide of a local teacher and Carol fails to report an elderly motorist involved in a hit-and-run with a cyclist, which proves particularly embarrassing when the victim turns out to be the hospital's new doctor. Leon Ockenden joins the cast

programme.title: Carry On Girls (1973)
programme.desc: The council of a seaside town is in dire need of a means to attract tourists to its resort, so announces a beauty contest. While the conniving organiser plots a series of publicity stunts, an outraged feminist group plans to sabotage the event. Comedy, starring Sid James, June Whitfield, Joan Sims, Barbara Windsor, Bernard Bresslaw and Peter Butterworth

programme.title: Goodnight Mister Tom (1998)
programme.desc: John Thaw stars in this adaptation of Michelle Magorian's wartime novel as Tom Oakley, an irascible widower whose life is changed for ever when nine-year-old London evacuee Willie is billeted in his cottage. The youngster takes to village life and the pair develop a strong bond - which looks set to be broken when Willie's tyrannical mother summons him back to the capital. Co-starring Nick Robinson and Annabelle Apsion

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Lesley Ashton (former Emmerdale actor Emma Atkins) arrives in Aidensfield looking for Don, and it is quickly clear that he is less than happy to see her, but despite his cool welcome she seems determined to make a new life for herself in the village. Elsewhere, Gina is pleased to be offered accommodation at the pub, Bernie receives a surprising offer from the recently widowed Iris Grocott and Ralph Spurling seeks Oscar's services as a private investigator after his house is broken into. Dominic Jephcott and Ann Mitchell guest star

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Marlon and Will tease Biff about his new job. Steve and Kim are faced with a raft of investors demanding their money back. Viv tackles Kelly about her attitude

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Vic apologises to Kelly for hitting her. Zoe and Kim have an argument on the anniversary of Frank's death. Biff is taken aback when Tara gives him a peck on the cheek

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Angie celebrates her 30th birthday. Alec enjoys being back behind the bar of the Rovers. Bill is upset to discover Maureen is seeing Fred

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Des is unaware that Derek has died and plays an awkward prank. Vera returns from Morecambe to discover Jack has sold half the pub to Alec

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: David Suchet takes on his final case as the Belgian sleuth in the last-ever episode of the long-running drama. Crippled with arthritis, Poirot is now using a wheelchair and has a life-threatening heart condition, but remains as sharp as ever. Calling on old friend Captain Hastings for assistance, he returns to Styles, where the pair first met 30 years earlier on a murder investigation. The detective is convinced the country house is once again harbouring a killer, and as guests fall victim to a mysterious attacker, he must summon the last of his strength to battle his ultimate nemesis. With Hugh Fraser, Anne Reid, Philip Glenister, Helen Baxendale, Matthew McNulty, Anna Madeley and Shaun Dingwall

programme.title: Larry Grayson: Shut That Door!
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the entertainer's rise from poverty to fame, drawing on extracts from an unfinished autobiography. Featuring contributions from friends and colleagues including Michael Barrymore, Janet Street-Porter, Chris Tarrant and Generation Game co-host Isla St Clair

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: A housewife found choked to death in her own home marks the third strangulation in a month, setting Oxford police on edge. As a manhunt begins in search of a murderer targeting married women, Endeavour looks into the origin of the silk stocking used to kill the latest victim, tracing the garment to its sole supplier in the city. However, as the suspect list narrows and the culprit stalks his prey with increasing desperation, Morse and Thursday find their private lives turned upside down and miss a deeper tragedy unfolding

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Things take a gruesome turn when Ferabbees Circus comes to town, bringing with it a chain of sinister clown sightings, threatening notes and deathly dangerous circus acts. Barnaby has to face up to his fears in order to solve the case. Drama, starring Neil Dudgeon, Nick Hendrix, Lorraine Ashbourne and Annette Badland

programme.title: Tommy Cooper Forever
programme.desc: First in a two-part tribute to the comedy magician, revealing how an act that started out in the desert during the Second World War went on to take the entertainment world by storm. Narrated by Martin Clunes and featuirng contributions from famous fans including Jennifer Saunders, Simon Callow, Lionel Blair, Anita Harris, Les Dennis and Jerome Flynn

programme.title: Tommy Cooper Forever
programme.desc: Part two of two. Singer and actress Anita Harris retraces her footsteps back to the London Palladium where she worked with Tommy. Comedian Les Dennis makes an emotional trip back to Her Majesty's Theatre to remember the night he saw Tommy's final performance. Plus, how Cooper became an unlikely comedy hero on Dutch TV in the 1960s

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: When the remains of a teenager are found half-buried in a wood, Vera finds herself investigating a 30-year-old mystery. Identified as Carrie Telling, a girl who disappeared during the 1984 miners' strike, the team retrieves news footage from the protests that shows her taking pictures in the background. It appears she got caught up in the unrest that day, contradicting her father's assertion that she went straight home. Photographs recovered from her camera yield further revelations for Vera. What did Carrie discover that ultimately led to her death?

programme.title: Rising Damp (1980)
programme.desc: Seedy landlord Rigsby takes in a seemingly respectable new lodger who jeopardises his efforts to romance tenant Miss Jones - but the new arrival may not be all he appears. Meanwhile, the addition of a rugby playing art student to the house sparks a fitness craze that leads Rigsby to enter a boxing match. Comedy based on the 1970s sitcom, starring Leonard Rossiter, Frances de la Tour and Don Warrington

programme.title: Rising Damp (1980)
programme.desc: Seedy landlord Rigsby takes in a seemingly respectable new lodger who jeopardises his efforts to romance tenant Miss Jones - but the new arrival may not be all he appears. Meanwhile, the addition of a rugby playing art student to the house sparks a fitness craze that leads Rigsby to enter a boxing match. Comedy based on the 1970s sitcom, starring Leonard Rossiter, Frances de la Tour and Don Warrington

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Kevin and Maggie have an awkward conversation about their fertility problems, while Rog and Mim arrive to discuss the forthcoming marriage blessing. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Josie Lawrence

programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Carry On Behind (1975)
programme.desc: Professors Ronald Crump and Anna Vooshka embark on an archaeological dig, but find their efforts disrupted by the saucy shenanigans of a motley bunch of holiday-makers in the neighbouring caravan park. Comedy, starring Kenneth Williams, Elke Sommer, Joan Sims, Windsor Davies, Kenneth Connor and Bernard Bresslaw

programme.title: Goodbye Mr Chips
programme.desc: Martin Clunes stars as an earnest Latin master working at the Brookfield School of the 1880s, where he meets and marries his true love Kathie and finds himself touched by politics, grief and the utter devastation of World War One. Charting more than 50 years of one man's extraordinary life, the story ends in the 1930s, as a wise, elderly and much-loved Mr Chipping lives out his last days in retirement. Frank Delaney's adaptation of James Hilton's timeless classic, which has never been out of print since first appearing as a magazine serialisation in 1934, and for which Robert Donat whipped an Oscar from under the nose of Gone with the Wind's Clark Gable in the 1939 film production. Also starring Victoria Hamilton, Conleth Hill and Patrick Malahide

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Satanic symbols painted on the church door convince the Reverend John Peggotty there is an evil presence in the churchyard, but George is certain it is the work of hooligans. However, an attack on Lord Ashfordly's godson Chas uncovers information that suggests a more personal motive, leading the investigation into the world of drugs and rock music. Elsewhere, Gina frets over some personal news. Guest starring Jeff Rawle, Adam Croasdell and Adam Kotz

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Vic blames Kelly for Viv going away. Kim tries to come to terms with her last day of being the owner of Home Farm. Tara double-crosses Chris

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Chris is furious with Tara, but she refuses to speak to him. Tara has a further shock in store for Chris. Kelly bunks off college to help Mandy with the jumble sale

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve tells Fiona that Alan threatened him. Vera changes the locks on the pub and refuses to let Alec in. Judy is disturbed to see Zoe begging in the streets

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jack is annoyed when Alec starts to boss him around. Des is put out when Samantha shuns his advances. Alan finds out all about Steve's marriage to Vicky from Alec

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: Jeffrey and George get into the festive spirit by challenging each other to a game of computer tennis. Festive instalment of the comedy, from 1978, starring Brian Murphy and Norman Eshley

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: Mildred tries to make an impression at the Young Conservatives' ball, whereas George is determined to find his own Christmas spirit at the Red Lion

programme.title: The Best of Cannon and Ball
programme.desc: Double act Tommy Cannon and Bobby Ball entertain us with their own unique brand of humour. Featuring guest stars Status Quo and Rik Mayall

programme.title: The Royal Variety Performance
programme.desc: The annual extravaganza to raise money for the Royal Variety Charity features performances from Sheridan Smith, reprising her role as Cilla Black, and Samantha Barks in an exclusive preview of the forthcoming Frozen stage musical. The show also features music from Michael Ball, Gary Barlow, Steps, Melanie C and Britain's Got Talent winner Jon Courtenay. Other acts on the bill include Marisha Wallace, Celeste, Daliso Chaponda, Jo Caulfield, Stephen Mulhern and the Black Blues Brothers, plus an appearance by Captain Sir Thomas Moore

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: As plans to build a new police station lead Morse to question his place in the force, he investigates the case of Tommy Cork, a boy from a broken home who has disappeared. Meanwhile, the body of disreputable journalist Eric Patterson has been found on railway tracks in mysterious circumstances. He was last seen embroiled in an argument with a council official about a company preparing to redevelop the site of Blenheim Vale, a disused correctional facility for boys. When a petty criminal with a connection to Blenheim absconds from an open prison, it sets off a chain reaction of events that threaten to expose horrors of the past. Did missing Tommy witness something that cost him his life?

programme.title: The Comedy Years
programme.desc: A look back at TV comedy from 1979. It was a pivotal year for Britain, with a new prime minister in Margaret Thatcher and mass strikes leading to the so-called 'Winter of Discontent'. Television saw a return to political satire, with the BBC series Not the Nine O'Clock News, though the northern club scene was dominating comedic output at the time with the likes of The Cannon & Ball Show and the stand-up series The Comedians. Narrated by Hugh Bonneville

programme.title: Elton John: The Nation's Favourite Song
programme.desc: A countdown of the singer's 20 most popular songs, chosen by viewers to celebrate his 70th birthday. Elton discusses the stories behind the tracks in a candid conversation with David Walliams, while celebrity fans and friends reveal what their favourite numbers mean to them. With contributions from Ed Sheeran, Annie Lennox, Stephen Fry and Elton's longtime songwriting partner Bernie Taupin

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: When a body is dredged up from a slurry pit on a remote farm, the investigation forces owner Danny Pryor to admit he has a number of illegal Serbian workers on the payroll. A faded tattoo identifies the victim as Jack Reeves, a young man from the local travelling community, but what is his connection to the immigrants? As the case unfolds, Vera and her team must connect the dots between Jack and a wounded Serbian, and expose the tragic truth at the heart of Pryor Farm. With Mark Bonnar, Mark Womack and Jim Sturgeon

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: When dock worker Owen Thorne plunges from the roof of a multi-storey car park while picking up his daughter from her school prom, Vera immediately detects foul play. The team soon discovers a work dispute over the death of a young man, with everyone believing Owen was to blame, and the victim's father admits he wanted revenge - but his alibi holds. The mystery then continues when Vera spots an inconsistency in the statement Owen's wife gave to the police, suggesting she's not certain of her husband's fidelity

programme.title: Goodbye Mr Chips
programme.desc: Martin Clunes stars as an earnest Latin master working at the Brookfield School of the 1880s, where he meets and marries his true love Kathie and finds himself touched by politics, grief and the utter devastation of World War One. Charting more than 50 years of one man's extraordinary life, the story ends in the 1930s, as a wise, elderly and much-loved Mr Chipping lives out his last days in retirement. Frank Delaney's adaptation of James Hilton's timeless classic, which has never been out of print since first appearing as a magazine serialisation in 1934, and for which Robert Donat whipped an Oscar from under the nose of Gone with the Wind's Clark Gable in the 1939 film production. Also starring Victoria Hamilton, Conleth Hill and Patrick Malahide

programme.title: Sport Filler Shows (2020)
programme.desc: A look back at a selection of sports covered by ITV during the 1980s

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: Glover hides from a vengeful Greek by having his head wrapped in bandages. Hospital comedy, starring Peter Bowles

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar agrees to help a girl find her missing brother and becomes embroiled in a drug-smuggling operation. Roger Moore and Burt Kwouk star

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Suffering from nervous exhaustion, Holmes sets off for a break on the wild Cornish peninsula, where he hopes the peace and quiet will help him convalesce. Unfortunately, several murders ensure his holiday is far from relaxing. Period detective drama, guest starring Denis Quilley

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Dempsey is accused of murdering a small-time criminal, forcing Makepeace to put her career on the line as she attempts to uncover evidence to support his claims of innocence. Detective drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur's prestige as a pillar of the community is boosted by an invitation to address a meeting of his local Rotary Club - which is being held in the very hotel where Terry is acting as temporary house detective. However, a pair of thieves posing as priests and a mangeress equally as crooked as Arthur threaten to ruin his grand moment. Drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A ministerial secretary innocently leaks information regarding a secret peace talks meeting to her lover, leading to a shooting incident and placing the future of the summit in jeopardy. While her boyfriend's involvement remains in doubt, Cowley gets her to pass on false information in the hope it will prove his innocence or confirm his guilt. Drama, starring Gordon Jackson, Lewis Collins and Martin Shaw

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Guest stars Eric Morecambe and Ernie Wise are entrusted to guard a consignment of heart pills by the girlfriend of the eminent research chemist developing the medicine. Before long, the comedy duo find themselves pursued by Middle Eastern operatives intent on procuring the new drug, as well as Sweeney officers who are trying to protect them. With John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin presents the final day of coverage in 2020, as Newbury takes centre stage with the Grade 1 Challow Hurdle today's feature race. Plus, four races from Leopardstown on the final day of the Irish Christmas Meeting. Analysis comes from Mick Fitzgerald and Luke Harvey, with reporting from Rishi Persad and Matt Chapman and commentary from Richard Hoiles

programme.title: Sport Filler Shows (2020)
programme.desc: A look back at a selection of the wide variety of sports covered by ITV during the 1990s, including Italia 90 and Euro 96

programme.title: Shalako (1968)
programme.desc: A party of European aristocrats on a hunting trip in New Mexico falls foul of marauding Apaches and the treachery of a guide, who abandons the group and makes off with their possessions. However, a US army scout knows of their presence in the territory and sets out to the rescue. Western, with Sean Connery, Brigitte Bardot, Jack Hawkins, Honor Blackman, Woody Strode, Peter Van Eyck and Eric Sykes

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part investigation into the Loch Ness Monster, extreme angler Jeremy Wade sets out to examine the evidence, review famous sightings and photographs and talk to eyewitnesses, as he researches the real creature that lies behind the myth

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis in which a team of five friends and family from Bromley answers questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then tries to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Radio 2 DJ Jo Whiley, Benidorm barman Jake Canuso, Law & Order: UK's Georgia Taylor and comedian Marcus Brigstocke compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by taking on one of the show's resident trivia experts in a test of their general knowledge. However, they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser. Bradley Walsh asks the questions

programme.title: Hellboy II: The Golden Army (2008)
programme.desc: The demon superhero, aided by a team from the Bureau of Paranormal Research and Defence, leads the fight against renegade elf Prince Nuada who is intent on reawakening an unstoppable robot army and bringing about the demise of mankind. Action fantasy sequel directed by Guillermo del Toro, starring Ron Perlman, Selma Blair, Doug Jones and Luke Goss

programme.title: Role Models (2008)
programme.desc: Two irresponsible salesmen find themselves in trouble with the law after crashing their truck. To avoid jail, they agree to undertake community service looking after a couple of troubled kids. However, it soon seems that going to prison would have been the easier option. Comedy, starring Paul Rudd, Seann William Scott and Christopher Mintz-Plasse

programme.title: The Mountain
programme.desc: A look at the busy summer season, when it is all-hands-on-deck as the epic Snowdon Race brings runners from all over the world to the mountain. Farmers Jo and Fiona deal with the frustrations of the season's busy months as unruly pets attack their livestock, while big crowds bring problems for Rob and the mountain rescue team.

programme.title: The Mountain
programme.desc: Snowdon gradually falls silent in the winter months and the residents around the highest peak in England and Wales have it almost to themselves. Railwayman Steff shuts down the summit centre at Hafod Eryri as the season ends, while Alwena also calls temporary time on her Halfwacafe. Plus, wild swimmer Viv goes for a bracing winter plunge and Jo the mountain farmer finally sets foot on the summit of Snowdon for the first time.

programme.title: Brian Moore Meets
programme.desc: A classic 1981 interview with the golf legend, who was then at the peak of his powers at the age of 22. Moore travels to Seve's home town of Pedrana in Northern Spain to find out about his upbringing and examines his single-minded pursuit of excellence

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A man who killed members of his family in their own home pleads not guilty on the grounds of insanity, but Quincy has his suspicions

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: An injured bare-knuckle boxer sparks off an investigation into an illegal organisation planning to distribute counterfeit currency. Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber star

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry intervenes in a tug-of-love dispute concerning an Anglo-Italian Mancini family, and finds himself unwittingly threatening the success of Arthur's latest money-making venture - a health club. Dennis Waterman and George Cole star

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: Following Norman's complaints about the standard of hospital food, Figgis leads the patients on a hunger strike. Comedy, starring Christopher Strauli and James Bolam

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar finds a suspicious building in Wales which is being used as a research laboratory, plunging him into the midst of a spine-chilling adventure. Spy drama, directed by and starring Roger Moore

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The mystery surrounding a legendary racehorse's disappearance is solved with the help of one of the most famous clues in the Holmes canon - 'the curious incident of the dog in the night-time'. Victorian detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett and Edward Hardwicke

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: An injured bare-knuckle boxer sparks off an investigation into an illegal organisation planning to distribute counterfeit currency. Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber star

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry intervenes in a tug-of-love dispute concerning an Anglo-Italian Mancini family, and finds himself unwittingly threatening the success of Arthur's latest money-making venture - a health club. Dennis Waterman and George Cole star

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: An old adversary of Doyle's stirs up rivalry between factions of political terrorist group the Organization as a diversion in order to launch a revenge attack on the CI5 operative, who he blames for the death of his brother. Action drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: An apparently respected gynaecologist's suitcase is stolen, but he is reluctant to reveal its contents. On further investigation the squad learns he was in the process of smuggling untaxed money out of the country and that a glamorous Latin woman with criminal connections, may hold the key to its whereabouts

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar investigates the suspicious deaths of five company directors, who each received a card with the words 'The Scales of Justice' printed on it prior to their demise. However, he finds his inquiries frustrated by the remaining members of the board. Roger Moore stars

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The mystery surrounding a legendary racehorse's disappearance is solved with the help of one of the most famous clues in the Holmes canon - 'the curious incident of the dog in the night-time'. Victorian detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett and Edward Hardwicke

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The detective duo pose as Middle Eastern terrorists in the search for an arms dealer reputed to be supplying weapons to violent groups in Britain. Glynis Barber stars

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur witnesses the untimely death of a business acquaintance, for which Chisholm appears to hold an old friend of Terry's accountable. In the circumstances, a spell in hospital seems like a good idea - but not all of Arthur's visitors arrive with flowers and grapes. George Cole and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: An old adversary of Doyle's stirs up rivalry between factions of political terrorist group the Organization as a diversion in order to launch a revenge attack on the CI5 operative, who he blames for the death of his brother. Action drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A sergeant is injured in a shooting incident and names his informant as the person responsible. However, the suspected man's girlfriend insists that the officer is corrupt and steals away to be with her lover, who has gone into hiding. Lynda La Plante guest stars

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Warwick Davis hosts the quiz, in which five friends from North Yorkshire answer questions about top 10 lists, with the successful ones joining the team captain to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade responds to reports from one of the US east coast's most popular vacation destinations, the sunny Florida Keys. A creature is attacking both visitors and locals alike, striking its victims so violently it is slicing open flesh and even smashing bones, and the assaults are happening both above and below the water. Jeremy is determined to discover the identity of the assailant and uncover what is triggering these attacks. He knows it is not going to be easy, and it is not long before the intrepid marine biologist fears he may be out of his depth

programme.title: The Fugitive (1993)
programme.desc: A doctor is convicted of his wife's murder and forced to go on the run to prove his innocence - but his efforts to find the mysterious one-armed man he believes is the real killer are hampered by a tenacious US marshal. Thriller, starring Harrison Ford, an Oscar-winning Tommy Lee Jones, Sela Ward, Julianne Moore and Joe Pantoliano

programme.title: Spartacus (1960)

programme.desc: An apparently respected gynaecologist's suitcase is stolen, but he is reluctant to reveal its contents.
